title: Hundkeller One
description: The one & only pre-configured, performance boosted, quality of life modpack for the private Hundkeller SMP of 6 Members, now public for all users as a client side modpack made to offer one of the best online experience possible.
body:
The one & only pre-configured, performance boosted, quality of life modpack for the private Hundkeller SMP of 6 Members, now public for all users as a client side modpack made to offer one of the best online experience possible. This pack also serves as a Fabric replacement for Optifine, and Fresh Animations.

<details>
